reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of elegance bias and Goodharting, but does not open fundamentally new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links compression preference, historical reenactment tests, and omission of awkward truths into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing filter-ranked explanations against hidden truths, awkward facts, and genuinely novel discovery tasks.
explanation: Optimizing explanations for elegance can systematically reward persuasive falsehood over messy truth and mimic discovery.
